calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Apr-04-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: John Heffner (by CourtCall) for David Ng.

Mr. Heffner reported that the petitioner is ready to proceed with distribution of the estate.
The Court inquired regarding the requested extraordinary fees where there appeared to be no extraordinary services provided. MrHeffner responded that the focus was on proceeding wwith the distribution, and that he would be submitting a revised order deleting the award of extraordinary fees. The Court granted the petition (subject to receipt and review of the order).

Judge: Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Craig Blackstone. Bailiff: Deputy Jaime. (Not reported)

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION

ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar Mar-07-2016 Off Calendar

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Jan-11-2016 Continued To Mar-07-16 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

The Court stated that it is now 10:05 a.m. and there is no appearance. An Order to Appear will be issued to the administrators David Ng and Daniel Ng and the Attorney John Heffner to appear on March 7, 2016 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to explain why they did not appear to update the court. The status hearing is also continued to that date. The parties are to inform the court of the status of the appeal.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Barrientos. (Not Reported)

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Jul-13-2015 Continued To Jan-11-16 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Steven Booska, appearing by CourtCall for Cecilia Chan.

Mr. Booska reported that the appeal in the related matter remains pending before the Court of Appeal, and that the parties have received no word from the Court of Appeal as of now. He requested that the hearing on this petition be continued for six months to see if the Court of Appeal takes action. The hearing on Petition re Account, Fees and Final Distribution was continued to January 11, 2016 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. A status report shall be filed at least two weeks prior to that date.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Craig Blackstone/Ella Yip. Bailiff: Deputy K. Kabasares. (Not Reported)

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Jan-12-2015 Continued To Jul-13-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: John Heffner for Co-Administrators. Larry Miller for Cecilia Ng.

Discussion was held regarding distribution of a one twelfth interest in the 2nd Avenue property. The petition for final distribution was continued to July 13, 2015 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 pending to the appeal.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy S. Park. (Not Reported)

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Dec-22-2014 Continued To Jan-12-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. McConico. (Not Reported)
